base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of enemy_hurt_palette_examples — a effect_layer (aura_vfx) from 1986 legend of zelda. Hurt-flash 4-palette example cycle for overworld enemies. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Hurt-flash 4-palette example cycle for overworld enemies; same loop convention as Link
